description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a matte black finish and a distinctive illuminated keyboard featuring RGB backlighting. The screen is open and displays a desktop interface with various icons and a geometric wallpaper, indicating the device is powered on. The laptop's lid features a prominent skull-shaped logo in the center, adding a unique and recognizable touch. The keyboard includes a full QWERTY layout with a function row and a large touchpad below. Multiple ports are visible along the sides, suggesting versatile connectivity options. The overall design is slim and angular, with a robust hinge and a professional, high-performance appearance.
description: A matte black laptop with RGB backlit keyboard, illuminated screen, and a skull logo on the lid. It features a slim, modern design with visible side ports and a large touchpad.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile, RGB keyboard, and partially visible ports on the left edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the full RGB keyboard, large touchpad, and the powered-on screen displaying a desktop interface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the right edge ports and the slim, angular design.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the matte black lid with a central skull logo and the laptop's hinge.
attribute_brand_logo: A skull-shaped logo is visible, centered on the back of the laptop lid. The logo is simple, monochrome, and stylized, with no accompanying text.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying a desktop interface with icons, wallpaper, and an application window.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a QWERTY layout with a function row, RGB backlighting, and a large touchpad below. No numeric keypad is present.
